architecture.summary: Pure MDX file edits. Uses existing CommandTabs component unchanged.

integrations.summary: No integrations. Editing existing Docusaurus docs files only.

ui-ux.summary: CommandTabs component handles UI with three tabs, responsive, dark mode. No changes to component.

security.summary: No security implications. Static MDX documentation files.

edge-cases.summary: Ensure valid MDX syntax, proper prop escaping. Pattern verified in 120 existing files.
